name: gws-setup
description: Set up the Google Workspace CLI (gws) from scratch. Guides through GCP project creation, OAuth credentials, authentication, and installing 90+ agent skills for Claude Code. Use when setting up gws for the first time, configuring Google Workspace API access, or troubleshooting gws auth issues. Triggers: "set up gws", "google workspace cli", "gws setup", "install gws".
